---
title: 'Levels of Change Part Two'
date: '2013-11-01T18:49:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '6428507413914561202'
blogger_filename: '/2013/11/levels-of-change-part-two_1.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Spiritual Growth'
---

<h2 style="text-align: center;">Foundations Class #2</h2><h2 style="text-align: center;">Levels of Change</h2><h3 style="text-align: center;">Bob Hamp</h3><h4 style="text-align: center;"><div align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: normal; mso-margin-bottom-alt: auto; mso-margin-top-alt: auto; mso-outline-level: 4; text-align: center;"><b><span style="font-family: &quot;times new roman&quot; , &quot;serif&quot;; font-size: 12pt;"><a href="http://bobhamp.com/media/" target="_blank">Class can be seen on BobHamp.com</a></span></b></div>Part Two</h4><h4 style="text-align: center;">The second level of change is Behavior (including Thoughts-Feelings)</h4><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/levels-of-change-2-29b0016d91e8.jpg" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="133" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/levels-of-change-2-60f0b13fdf60.jpg" width="400" /></a></div><h4 style="text-align: center;"></h4>Once we realize that changing the circumstance will not bring  change we fall into the mistake of looking at Behavior. I simply need to  "stop doing this" or "start doing that"... At this level you can  accomplish some things but not the thing you are hungry for. <br /><br /><br />This is connected to the level of your experience/environment. "Bob how are you doing? I'm <b>doing </b>fine. How do you feel? I <b>feel </b>great. What else is going on? I <b>think </b>everything is fine." OR "I'm <b>doing </b>lousy, I <b>feel </b>awful, I <b>think </b>I'm  going to faint..." This is the outward expression of the inward  experience of being you. You are describing what it's like to be you. <br /><br />This creates a problem when dealing with change. If you've ever <b>done </b>something stupid what happens. You <b>think </b>"that was stupid". Then you <b>feel </b>stupid.  Then you will continue to perpetuate this pattern. Do, Think, Feel  become a self feeding cycle. The more I think stupid I feel stupid, the  more I feel stupid the more I do stupid, the more I think stupid...<br /><br />&nbsp;This  is also the level of our "Flesh". A significant portion of counselors  point to this level. Cognitive therapy often deals at this level. Think  your way to feeling better. Rational Emotive therapy. When you think  rational thoughts you will have rational emotions. Using your mind to  control your behavior or shape your emotions is like arm wrestling  yourself. You will win, and loose that arm wrestle. Or taking your hands  and putting them under your feet and trying to lift yourself up off the  floor.<br /><br />Churches are guilty of this too. "All we can do  is arm wrestle ourselves and some days we win and some days we loose  and the blood covers the bad days. That's just the way it is..."<br /><br />The  way you act affects your environment. Our environment is subject to our  behavior, but our behavior is reinforced by our environment/experience.  Is everyone driving too slow or are you driving to fast? <br /><br /><h4><b>Characterized by: "I wish I wouldn't..." What we discover is that what we do is connected to what we think or what we feel.</b></h4><br /><br /><i>*The teachings of this class are not my own, they are derived from notes I took during a class at Gateway Church. You may view the class on their website by following the link at the top of the page.</i><br /><br /><li><a href="http://darrellwolfe.blogspot.com/2013/10/levels-of-change-part-one.html" target="_blank">Levels of Change Part One</a></li><li><a href="http://darrellwolfe.blogspot.com/2013/11/levels-of-change-part-two.html" target="_blank">Levels of Change Part Two</a></li><li><a href="http://darrellwolfe.blogspot.com/2013/11/levels-of-change-part-three.html" target="_blank">Levels of Change Part Three</a></li><li><a href="http://darrellwolfe.blogspot.com/2013/11/levels-of-change-part-four.html" target="_blank">Levels of Change Part Four</a></li><li><a href="http://darrellwolfe.blogspot.com/2013/11/levels-of-change-part-five.html" target="_blank">Levels of Change Part Five</a></li><li><a href="http://darrellwolfe.blogspot.com/2013/11/levels-of-change-part-six.html" target="_blank">Levels of Change Part Six</a></li><li><a href="http://darrellwolfe.blogspot.com/2013/11/levels-of-change-part-seven.html" target="_blank">Levels of Change Part Seven</a></li><li><a href="http://darrellwolfe.blogspot.com/2013/11/levels-of-change-part-eight.html" target="_blank">Levels of Change Part Eight</a></li><li><a href="http://darrellwolfe.blogspot.com/2013/11/levels-of-change-part-nine.html" target="_blank">Levels of Change Part Nine</a></li><span style="background-color: white; font-family: &quot;trebuchet ms&quot; , &quot;trebuchet&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: 12.72px; line-height: 16.36px;">______________________________________________</span><br /><br /><br />By&nbsp;<a href="https://plus.google.com/+DarrellWolfe/posts" target="_blank">Darrell Wolfe</a><br /><br /><div><a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/" rel="nofollow" style="background-color: white; color: #397dbf; font-family: &quot;trebuchet ms&quot; , &quot;trebuchet&quot; , sans-serif; line-height: 16.36px; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">www.DarrellWolfe.com</a></div><div><br /><h4><a href="http://darrellwolfe.blogspot.com/2013/11/connect.html" style="background-color: white; color: #397dbf; font-family: &quot;trebuchet ms&quot; , &quot;trebuchet&quot; , sans-serif; line-height: 16.36px; text-decoration: none;">Connect</a></h4></div><div><span style="font-family: &quot;trebuchet ms&quot; , sans-serif;">Tumblr&nbsp;<a href="http://darrellwolfe.tumblr.com/" rel="nofollow" target="_blank">DarrellWolfe</a><br /><span style="line-height: 16.36px;">Facebook&nbsp;</span><a href="https://www.facebook.com/DarrellGWolfe" style="line-height: 16.36px;" target="_blank">DarrellGWolfe</a><br /><span style="line-height: 16.36px;">Twitter&nbsp;</span><a href="https://twitter.com/darrellwolfe" style="line-height: 16.36px;" target="_blank">@DarrellWolfe</a><br /><span style="line-height: 16.36px;">Google+&nbsp;</span><a href="https://plus.google.com/b/106337514196493406365/+DarrellWolfeBlogspot/posts" rel="" style="line-height: 16.36px;" target="_blank">DarrellGWolfe</a><br />YouTube&nbsp;<a href="http://www.youtube.com/user/darrellgwolfe" target="_blank">DarrellGWolfe</a></span><br /><ul></ul></div><span style="background-color: white; font-family: &quot;trebuchet ms&quot; , &quot;trebuchet&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: 12.72px; line-height: 16.36px;"><br /></span><span style="background-color: white; font-family: &quot;trebuchet ms&quot; , &quot;trebuchet&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: x-small; line-height: 16.36px;"><i><b>Disclaimers:</b></i></span><br /><span style="background-color: white; font-family: &quot;trebuchet ms&quot; , &quot;trebuchet&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: x-small; line-height: 16.36px;"><i><b><br /></b></i></span><span style="background-color: white; font-family: &quot;trebuchet ms&quot; , &quot;trebuchet&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: x-small; line-height: 16.36px;"><i><b>FOR MY FULL DISCLAIMER: See my "<a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/about-20.html" target="_blank">Start Here About</a>" page.&nbsp;<a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/about-20.html" target="_blank">Click Here</a></b></i></span><br /><span style="background-color: white; font-family: &quot;trebuchet ms&quot; , &quot;trebuchet&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: x-small; line-height: 16.36px;"><i><br /></i></span><span style="background-color: white; font-family: &quot;trebuchet ms&quot; , &quot;trebuchet&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: x-small;"><i><span style="line-height: 16.36px;">*&nbsp;<b>Information here is As-Is.</b>&nbsp;These are the opinions of a fellow traveler and seeker of truth. I am not a doctor, lawyer,&nbsp;</span><span style="line-height: 16.36px;">licensed</span><span style="line-height: 16.36px;">&nbsp;financial advisor, tax preparer, etc, etc... I'm just one guy, sharing what he's learned. As such, the information may be as true or faulty as the guy on the buss stop giving you directions. If you need accurate information I encourage you to seek the help of a professional in your field.&nbsp;</span></i></span><br /><span style="background-color: white; font-family: &quot;trebuchet ms&quot; , &quot;trebuchet&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: x-small;"><span style="line-height: 16.36px;"><i><br /></i></span></span><span style="font-family: &quot;trebuchet ms&quot; , &quot;trebuchet&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: x-small;"><span style="background-color: white; line-height: 16.36px;"><i>*<b>&nbsp;I do make money from this blog.</b>&nbsp;<a href="http://biblehub.com/1_timothy/5-18.htm" target="_blank">1 Tim 5:18</a>&nbsp;says the worker is worthy of his wages. I do earn affiliate commissions or freebies from some of the products I discuss at various points on this blog. Regardless I only suggest things that have personally helped me, or someone I know. If you click on an "Affiliate Link" and you buy something I'll get a cut. Thanks for your support!&nbsp;</i></span></span><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;trebuchet ms&quot; , &quot;trebuchet&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: x-small;"><span style="background-color: white; line-height: 16.36px;"><i><br /></i></span></span><span style="font-family: &quot;trebuchet ms&quot; , &quot;trebuchet&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: x-small;"><span style="background-color: white;"><span style="line-height: 16.36px;"><i>*&nbsp;<b>I am a conservative Christian.</b>&nbsp;I write from a bible-centric point of view. I welcome people from other points of view to jump into the&nbsp;conversation. If you don't like bible-centric writing: I encourage you not to read my posts.... Unless you want to learn something new.&nbsp;</i></span></span></span><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;trebuchet ms&quot; , &quot;trebuchet&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: x-small;"><span style="background-color: white;"><span style="line-height: 16.36px;"><i><br /></i></span></span></span><span style="font-family: &quot;trebuchet ms&quot; , &quot;trebuchet&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: x-small;"><span style="background-color: white;"><span style="line-height: 16.36px;"><i><b>* In all you do: Live Long and Prosper, with GOOD SUCCESS!&nbsp;</b></i></span></span></span><br /><span style="background-color: white; font-family: &quot;trebuchet ms&quot; , &quot;trebuchet&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: x-small;"><span style="line-height: 16.36px;"><i><br /></i></span></span><span style="background-color: white; font-family: &quot;trebuchet ms&quot; , &quot;trebuchet&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: x-small;"><span style="line-height: 16.36px;"><i><br /></i></span></span><i><span style="font-size: x-small;"><b><span style="background-color: white; font-family: &quot;trebuchet ms&quot; , &quot;trebuchet&quot; , sans-serif;"><span style="line-height: 16.36px;">Thank you,&nbsp;</span></span><a href="https://plus.google.com/+DarrellWolfe/posts" target="_blank">Darrell Wolfe</a></b></span></i><br /><span style="background-color: white; font-family: &quot;trebuchet ms&quot; , &quot;trebuchet&quot; , sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12.72px; line-height: 16.36px;"><br /></span></span>
